name: Sonatype Nexus Repository and Lifecycle API
what_it_does: Software composition analysis and artifact management platform with REST API — enabling DevSecOps teams to scan dependencies for vulnerabilities (Nexus Lifecycle), manage artifact repositories (Nexus Repository), enforce open-source policy (OSSINDEX), and generate SBOMs, with integrations into CI/CD pipelines and IDEs for shift-left security.
use_cases: Scanning dependencies via Sonatype Lifecycle API for vulnerability detection in CI/CD pipelines
Managing artifact repositories via Nexus Repository API for private Maven/npm/Docker registries
Enforcing open-source license policies via Sonatype API for legal compliance automation
Generating SBOMs via Sonatype API for software supply chain transparency reporting
Querying OSS Index via Sonatype API for open-source vulnerability data on demand
not_for: SAST/code scanning (use Semgrep or CodeQL for source code analysis)
Runtime security monitoring (use Falco or Datadog for runtime)
Container scanning without dependency focus (use Trivy for pure container scanning)
best_when: A DevSecOps team needs artifact management (Nexus Repository) combined with deep SCA policy enforcement in CI/CD — Sonatype's OSS Index provides one of the most comprehensive open-source vulnerability databases.
avoid_when: You need SAST, runtime security, or a simpler SCA tool without the complexity of Nexus Repository management.

auth.notes: Nexus IQ (Lifecycle): HTTP Basic auth (username:password) or API token. Nexus Repository: HTTP Basic or API key (user token). OSS Index: API key via Authorization: Basic (apiKey:hash format). REST API: nexus-iq-server:8070/api/v2/ (Lifecycle); nexus-repository-host:8081/service/rest/v1/ (Repository). Self-hosted Nexus IQ and Nexus Repository servers. Cloud (Sonatype IQ Cloud): hosted version. Webhooks for policy violations. Jenkins, Maven, Gradle plugins available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Nexus Repository OSS: free self-hosted; OSS Index: free for public packages
pricing.paid_tiers: Nexus Repository Pro: custom; Nexus Lifecycle: custom enterprise
pricing.notes: US company (Fulton, MD). Founded 2008 by Brian Fox and Jason van Zyl (Maven co-creator). Sonatype is majority-owned by Vista Equity Partners (PE). Central Repository: sonatype.com operates Maven Central — world's largest Java artifact repository. OSS Index: free vulnerability database for open-source components (ossindex.sonatype.com). Products: Nexus Repository (artifact management), Nexus Lifecycle (SCA/policy), Nexus Firewall (malicious package blocking). Java ecosystem heritage: Maven/Gradle native. Repository formats: Maven, npm, PyPI, NuGet, Docker, Helm, RubyGems. Deep Java SCA expertise. Malicious package detection: proactive supply chain attack prevention.

performance.rate_limits: OSS Index: 64 requests/minute per IP; IQ Server: not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP Basic or API token. Self-hosted servers (Nexus IQ + Repository). OSS Index free tier. OSS Index: 64 req/min. Vista Equity PE ownership. Java-heritage (Maven Central). Webhooks for policy violations. Maven/Gradle/Jenkins plugins.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Application scans: idempotent by applicationId + sourceControlId. Policy evaluation: deterministic for same component versions. Repository reads: fully idempotent. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers for policy violations.
known_agent_gotchas: Two separate self-hosted products: Nexus Repository (artifact management) and Nexus IQ Server (lifecycle/SCA) — different APIs
OSS Index (free): separate API at ossindex.sonatype.com — 64 req/min limit for automated scanning
Self-hosted deployment: API base URL is YOUR server (not sonatype.com) — configure endpoint before integration
HTTP Basic auth: use API token (not password) for service accounts — generate in UI
Nexus Repository OSS vs Pro: significant API capability difference — confirm your edition
Maven Central (repo1.maven.org): managed by Sonatype — component coordinates use Maven GAV format

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HTTP Basic with API token (not password). SOC2 certified. Self-hosted deployment: operator responsible for security hardening. Sonatype operates Maven Central — high trust in OSS index. Malicious package detection: proactive supply chain defense. OSS Index: 64 req/min prevents abuse. Vista Equity PE ownership: financial stability risk. Vulnerability database: comprehensive but proprietary scoring (not purely CVSS). GDPR compliance for Lifecycle cloud edition.
